input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.5.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.5.3
            TITLE: a dummy connector or similar may be used to restore isolation to meet ev.6.1.2

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.5.3: A dummy connector or similar may be used to restore isolation to meet EV.6.1.2
EV.5.5.3 A dummy connector or similar may be used to restore isolation to meet EV.6.1.2

final_answer: A dummy connector or similar may be used to restore isolation to meet EV.6.1.2
